subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou beholdest the holy souls, martyred in the arena of sacrifice, whose limbs have been severed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری النفوس المقدسه المستشهده فی مشهد الفداء المتقطعه الاعضاء
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @martyrs and martyrdom
